name: Emily R.
text: Pig Island private longtail boat was honestly one of the highlights of our trip to Koh Samui. Everything was perfectly organized from hotel pickup to the return transfer. The staff was friendly, professional, and always ready to answer questions. The long table setup on the beach was beautiful and private, perfect for couples and families. Food quality was excellent, especially the fresh seafood. If you are wondering whether this experience is worth it, absolutely yes.

name: Estefanía
text: I booked this island speedboat tour after comparing several companies, and I'm glad I chose this one. Everything happened exactly as described. The hotel pickup was on time, the boat was clean, and the crew was friendly without making anything feel rushed. We had enough time for snorkeling, swimming, and enjoying each island. The equipment was in good condition, lunch was better than expected, and there was drinking water available all day. One of the best experiences of our holiday in Koh Samui.

name: Nicolas Spenza
text: Great snorkeling tour to Koh Tao! The organization was excellent, the staff was friendly and professional, and we saw beautiful marine life. Everything ran smoothly from start to finish. Highly recommended!

name: Александр Гущин
text: Very good tours. The staff are attentive and polite. We took a private island tour and really enjoyed everything. The itinerary was full and well-organized. I highly recommend it.

name: Simm Alias
text: We really enjoyed our 2 half-days trip, service was swift and professional. Jérôme and Nico from France.

name: Andres Hernandez
text: Amazing speedboat tour, highly recommended! We had an incredible day. The speedboat was modern, clean, and very comfortable, even during the longer rides between islands. The crew was professional, friendly, and always made sure everyone felt safe. Snorkeling equipment was included and in excellent condition. We had plenty of time to swim, snorkel, relax on the beaches, and take photos without feeling rushed. Lunch, drinking water, soft drinks, and fresh fruit were all provided. The itinerary was exactly as described, and hotel pickup was on time. Well organized, great value for money, and one of the highlights of our trip.

name: วัสวี เรืองศรี
text: We booked the Pig Island tour in Koh Samui with TourInKohSamui and everything was excellent from start to finish. Fast response on WhatsApp, easy booking process, and very professional staff. Hotel pickup was perfectly on time and the speedboat was clean and comfortable. Pig Island was beautiful, snorkeling was amazing, and the guides made the whole experience fun and safe. Highly recommend.

name: Chitsnuphong Singha
text: TourInKohSamui made our holiday much easier. Very quick communication, honest prices, and no hidden costs. The Pig Island tour was the highlight of our trip.

name: Ernestojuan Pereyra
text: Excellent service, great prices, and very friendly staff! I will definitely return to this place!

name: Federico Dignani
text: The expert was amazing! The best thing about Thailand.

name: Prapai Seesiri
text: Booking is very convenient, quick, and easy for your trip to Koh Samui.

name: Joselinne Mollick
text: The trip was absolutely fantastic overall, and the team was very friendly and helpful. Pig Island was beautiful, and the experience with the pigs was truly special. Unfortunately, we had quite a bit of rain that day and the sea was a little rough, which of course no one can control. Nevertheless, the crew did their best and we ended up having a great time. We would still highly recommend the tour!
